message:
test(fcp-conformance/host-discovery-metadata): pin CacheMetadata + ResponseMeta + PreflightRateLimit + EstimatedCost + ToolExample wire format (resolves flywheel_connectors-ggt4t)

18 tests pinning the discovery metadata-payload wire format every
agent + dashboard consumer reads from the host's discovery + preflight
endpoints.

- CacheMetadata: 4-field serde roundtrip identity (etag,
  last_modified, max_age_seconds, stale_while_revalidate_seconds);
  stale_while_revalidate omits when None; PartialEq compares every
  field
- ResponseMeta: status + optional message roundtrip; message
  omits when None; status accepts any u16 (100..u16::MAX);
  PartialEq compares both fields
- PreflightRateLimit: limited + remaining required, reset_at omits
  when None; limited=true+remaining=0 documented as "rate-limited
  now" state
- EstimatedCost: all-None serializes to '{}'; cost_cents documented
  as USD cents (field name encodes unit); partial population omits
  None fields; full roundtrip
- ToolExample: minimal-with-only-input roundtrip; description+output
  omit when None; full 3-field roundtrip; input is arbitrary
  serde_json::Value (null, number, string, array, object all
  preserved)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
